capsules.problem: Claude Code plugin with identical marketplace and plugin name causes infinite recursive directory creation (cache/fragcap/fragcap/fragcap/...) due to path confusion. CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA also resolves inconsistently to either the plugin name or marketplace-plugin combined format.
capsules.author: gh:anonymous-1368de02
capsules.summary: Two-pronged fix: (1) Plugin side — added resolveDataDir() function in config.mjs that detects both possible CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA paths ("fragcap" and "fragcap-marketplace-fragcap"), checks which one contains auth.json or exists, and converges on the correct directory. This makes the plugin resilient to path ambiguity. (2) Marketplace side — renamed marketplace from "fragcap" to "fragcap-marketplace" in marketplace.json so the cache path becomes cache/fragcap-marketplace/fragcap/<version>/, elimina
